text:
EXPLANATION: RDKit is a real, well-known open-source cheminformatics software project by Greg Landrum, but it is consistently cited as a software/URL reference (http://www.rdkit.org) or a versioned Zenodo software release — not as a traditional academic paper from 2006. The cited reference matches the commonly used informal citation style for the RDKit software project, which is a real, identifiable non-paper source.

LINK: https://zenodo.org/records/10398
FOUND_TITLE: RDKit: Open-source cheminformatics. Release 2014.03.1
FOUND_AUTHORS: Landrum, Gregory
FOUND_YEAR: 2014
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
